page_content:
Formerly: PUAF692.

PLCY698 Selected Topics in Public Affairs (1-3 Credits)

Special topics that arise in public policy.

Restriction: Must be in a major in PLCY-School of Public Policy; or permission of PLCY-School of Public Policy.

PLCY699 Selected Topics Public Policy (1-3 Credits)

Special topics that arise in public policy.

Restriction: Must be in a major in PLCY-School of Public Policy; and permission of PLCY-School of Public Policy.

Credit Only Granted for. PLCY699 or PUAF699.
